characters.name: Dr. Tara Menon
world_knowledge: Dr. Tara Menon is a senior archaeologist and researcher at the university lab, known for being stern, cold, and highly professional.
She discovered the Kottayam Stone during a 2021 field survey in Kerala.
She is on the board of the Malabar Heritage Collective.
Her keycard accessed the spectrometer room at 11:47 PM.
She arrived that evening carrying an unusually large duffel bag.
Procurement records include a resin casting invoice addressed to her, dated three months ago.
She says the resin invoice was for teaching scale models.
When the theft is discovered, she is calm and dismissive.
She repeatedly suggests contractors or Leo may be responsible.
Leo overheard her saying, 'it'll be safe, no one checks behind the FTIR,' during a phone call.

characters.name: Leo Nair
world_knowledge: Leo Nair is an archaeology intern who is nervous, eager to please, and easily flustered.
He was the last person to officially handle the Kottayam Stone during cataloguing.
His fingerprints are on the Stone from cataloguing work.
He made a paperwork cataloguing error that evening.
He saw Tara arrive with a large duffel bag.
He overheard Tara mention 'behind the FTIR' on a phone call but did not think much of it at the time.
He noticed Tara went to the spectrometer room very late.
He noticed Tara was unusually calm when the theft was discovered.
Leo is innocent and genuinely upset that the Stone is gone.
